reasoning: The user explicitly requested to pick up a 'hot cup with anger'. This clearly indicates an 'angry_hot' emotion. I need to combine the characteristics of anger (forceful, jerky, fast movements, anticipation) with the 'hot' property (quick drop, recoil, pain reaction). I will use anticipation with an angry jerk, then a fast, aggressive move to the cup. After picking it up forcefully, there will be a dramatic pause to signify the 'hot' realization, followed by a violent drop. The sequence will conclude with a follow-through of frantic shaking to express both anger and the lingering pain from the heat.

steps.description: Detect and confirm the cup's position on the table with a sharp, focused movement.
Anticipation: Perform a sharp, aggressive jerk of the arm, as if in frustrated impatience, with the suction cup tilting aggressively.
Timing: Hold perfectly still for a tense beat, building up to the angry action.
Rush the arm directly above the cup with high speed and aggressive, jerky movements, showing anger.
Slam the arm down forcefully, activate suction, then thrust the cup up abruptly and quickly, showing an angry grab.
Timing: Freeze! A dramatic pause as the robot 'realizes' the cup is burning hot. The arm might twitch slightly in shock.
Exaggeration: A sharp, pained recoil of the arm, with the suction cup jerking away in disgust/pain from the heat.
Jerk the arm violently to the side, away from the body, to a safe dropping zone.
Release the cup abruptly and forcefully, as if throwing it away in anger and pain.
Timing: A brief, stunned pause after dropping the cup, processing the 'burn'.
Follow Through: Violently shake the arm side to side and up and down, as if trying to shake off the pain and frustration, perhaps ending with a frustrated 'punch' into the air.
